info.title: NextHire Backend API
info.description: API documentation for the NextHire job portal. Covers job seekers, company admins, and super admins. Access tokens (5 min) are returned in JSON and may be stored in the `token` cookie or Bearer header. Refresh tokens (1 day) use the httpOnly `jwt` cookie only — required for POST /api/v1/auth/refresh and OAuth handoff. Realtime notifications are also pushed over WebSocket at /ws (access token auth).

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Authentication, refresh cookies, and docs handoff

tags.name: Applications
tags.description: Job application submissions and status tracking

tags.name: Lookup
tags.description: Public lookup data such as categories and locations

cookieAuth.name: jwt
cookieAuth.description: Refresh token cookie (httpOnly). Used by POST /api/v1/auth/refresh and set by login/OAuth.

accessTokenCookie.name: token
accessTokenCookie.description: Short-lived access token cookie (optional; Bearer header also supported).

requirements.example: 3+ years of experience with Express and Prisma

message.example: You applied for "Backend Engineer" at Tech Corp.

token.description: New access token (JWT, includes id + role)

get.description: Public when DOCS_PUBLIC=true; otherwise requires super_admin Bearer/cookie session.
Public when DOCS_PUBLIC=true; otherwise requires super_admin session.

400.description: Validation error or user already exists

post.summary: Exchange refresh cookie for a new access token
post.description: Reads the httpOnly `jwt` refresh cookie, validates it, rotates refresh token, and returns a new access token in JSON. Used by the frontend after OAuth (cross-origin POST with credentials: include) and for silent session refresh.

get.summary: Super admin docs handoff (sets short-lived token cookie → /docs)
get.description: Accepts a super_admin access token as query param, sets a 5-minute httpOnly `token` cookie on the API host, then redirects to /docs. Used by the admin sidebar API Docs link.

302.description: Redirect to /docs with token cookie set

get.summary: Get all jobs for super admin
Get all jobs with pagination & filtering
get.description: Public endpoint. Authentication is not required.
Public endpoint. Optional auth may affect saved/applied state in the response.

post.summary: Toggle save/unsave a job for current user

get.summary: Get notifications for the current user
get.description: HTTP fallback for the notification feed. Live events are also pushed via WebSocket (notification:new / notification:remove).

get.summary: Get jobs posted by the current company

Suspend or un-suspend a company account

Get all applicants for the current company

302.description: Redirect to GitHub OAuth consent screen

get.description: On success: sets httpOnly `jwt` refresh cookie via generateTokens, then redirects to FRONTEND_URL/auth/callback (no access token in URL). Frontend completes sign-in with POST /api/v1/auth/refresh (credentials: include). If maintenance_mode is on and user is not super_admin, redirects to FRONTEND_URL/login?error=maintenance.

302.description: Redirect to frontend /auth/callback (refresh cookie set; no token in URL)
Redirect to LinkedIn OAuth consent screen

Frontend completes sign-in with POST /api/v1/auth/refresh (credentials: include). If maintenance_mode is on and user is not super_admin, redirects to FRONTEND_URL/login?error=maintenance.
